Class PlayerRepository

java.lang.Object
net.sylphian.minecraft.profile.db.repositories.PlayerRepository
All Implemented Interfaces:
IPlayerRepository
public class PlayerRepository extends Object implements IPlayerRepository
Repository implementation for player data using JDBI. Wraps blocking database calls in CompletableFuture and executes them on a dedicated database thread pool.

      public CompletableFuture<Void> insert(PlayerModel player)

      Returns:

      public CompletableFuture<Void> update(PlayerModel player)
      Description copied from interface: IPlayerRepository
      Updates an existing player record in the database.

      update in interface IPlayerRepository
      Parameters:

      Returns:
